Grade A · Premium

Green Cardamom

Hand-picked from Idukki's high-altitude gardens. Bold aroma, deep green colour and plump pods — the benchmark for export quality.

OriginIdukki, Kerala
Moisture< 12%
Min. Order25 kg
PackingPP Bags / Cartons
₹2,450 / kg ex-Kerala
🖤

Grade A · Export

Black Pepper

Sun-dried Malabar black pepper with high piperine content. Preferred by importers across Europe and Middle East for sharp, lasting heat.

OriginIdukki, Kerala
Piperine> 4.5%
Min. Order50 kg
PackingJute / PP Bags
₹680 / kg ex-Kerala
🤍

Premium · Specialty

White Pepper

Carefully processed to reveal a milder, refined heat. Preferred in European cuisines and premium food manufacturing worldwide.

OriginKerala
ProcessWater Soaked
Min. Order25 kg
PackingVacuum / PP Bags
₹820 / kg ex-Kerala

Why PepperZing

The Standard We Never Compromise

🌱

Direct from Farm

We work with farmer cooperatives in Idukki, Kerala. No middlemen — better price for you, better income for farmers.

🔬

Quality Assured

Every batch is graded, cleaned and lab-tested before dispatch. FSSAI certified facility with consistent quality processes.

🚢

Export Expertise

Full export documentation handled — phytosanitary certificates, Spices Board registration, commercial invoice and packing list.

📦

Consistent Supply

Year-round availability through strategic sourcing. Long-term supply contracts available for importers and institutional buyers.

Global Reach

Shipping to 15+ Countries

From the Cardamom Hills of Kerala to spice markets worldwide — we handle every step of the export process so you don't have to.

🇦🇪 UAE🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia 🇬🇧 UK🇺🇸 USA 🇩🇪 Germany🇸🇬 Singapore 🇲🇾 Malaysia🇦🇺 Australia 🇨🇦 Canada+ More
